channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Salesforce adds skills to its AI agents and agentic platform to serve more enterprise use cases
item.description: Customer relationship management (CRM) software provider Salesforce has updated its agentic AI platform, Agentforce, to make it easier for enterprises to build more efficient agents faster and deploy them across a variety of systems or workflows.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Snapchat is overhauling how influencers earn money on the platform
item.description: “I’m sorry WHO is using snapchat in the big year of 2024,” one X user asked. Turns out, a lot of people and for some, it’s proving lucrative. Influencer Julieanna Goddard, better known as YesJulz, recently posted her impressive Snapchat earnings to social media in response to the question.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: FBI Warns Against Shooting at Mysterious Drones in the Sky - NewsNation
item.description: The FBI has issued a warning against shooting guns or pointing lasers at mysterious drones spotted in the sky, citing concerns for pilot and passenger safety.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Self-proclaimed bitcoin inventor Craig Wright faces contempt of court in $1.2 trillion lawsuit
item.description: An Australian computer scientist who claimed he invented bitcoin was on Friday accused of contempt of court after he filed a 911 billion-pound ($1.18 trillion) lawsuit against Twitter founder Jack Dorsey‘s payments firm Block in Britain.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: The Supreme Court will hear arguments over the TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok has once last chance in court to fight its impending ban. The Supreme Court on Wednesday agreed to take up the social media company’s appeal challenging a federal law that would likely ban the app as soon as next month. The nation’s highest court will hear oral arguments on Jan.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: McConnell urges Supreme Court to reject TikTok's bid to delay ban
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) filed an amicus brief with the Supreme Court on Wednesday, urging it to reject TikTok’s request to delay a law that could ban the app next month.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Infosys co-founder says 70-hour workweek is India’s answer
item.description: Indian consulting giant Infosys co-founder Narayana Murthy has once again argued that employees in India should have a 70-hour workweek, NDTV reports. Murthy has previously made similar statements in October 2023 and in January 2024.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: YouTube’s top trends for 2024 include Bay Area creators
item.description: Online video giant YouTube has published its year-end top trends lists for 2024 and in includes Bay Area content creators.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: OpenAI rolls out upgrade to reasoning model, new dev tools
item.description: The release Tuesday by OpenAI of OpenA1 o1, its reasoning model, in API, along with three new sets of tools for developers, is a “smart move that keeps [it] in the corporate/enterprise conversation, as so many customers are shifting their focus towards agentic applications over simpler chat-based ap
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tabnine code assistant now flags unlicensed code
item.description: Looking to minimize IP liability for generative AI output, Tabnine’s AI coding assistant now checks code for licensing restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Slack adds Agentforce ‘hub’ for AI agents
item.description: Slack is adding a new way to access AI agents created on parent company Salesforce’s Agentforce platform, with a library of options available in the collaboration app. Agentforce, which launched in October, is a tool to build AI agents that answer questions and automate tasks for users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot
item.description: In today's Federal Newscast, Homeland Security has rolled out its own generative AI chatbot, now available to roughly 19,000 employees. The post Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft's GenAI-Based Copilot App Hits Snag with Entra Platform
item.description: Microsoft's genAI-based Copilot app for Windows hits snag with company's identity and access management platform Entra, prompting advisory to uninstall and reconfigure the app.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: That text from the US Postal Service could be a scam. How to avoid ‘smishing’ fraud
item.description: Be careful in the final week before Christmas, because scammers are trying to use text messages to take advantage of you.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: AWS reveals $10bn cloud and AI investment in Ohio, bringing hundreds of jobs
item.description: Amazon Web Services will have invested $23 billion in Ohio by 2030 following announcement of new $10 billion funding.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CompTIA launches expert-level cybersecurity certification
item.description: CompTIA this week made available its CompTIA SecurityX certification program, which is an updated version of the CompTIA Advanced Security Practitioner (CASP+) cert and part of CompTIA’s Xpert Series of certifications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Salesforce reveals major hiring push to sell AI products
item.description: 2,000 sales representative jobs have come up at Salesforce as it prepares to handle increased demand for its AI tools.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump backs dockworkers as costly strike looms before inauguration
item.description: President-elect Trump has thrown his weight behind dockworkers’ demands for automation protections, as he braces for a strike that could significantly disrupt the economy just days before he is set to take office.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Kazakhstan’s Carpet CCTV: Pioneering the future of AI-powered public safety
item.description: In a world where technology increasingly shapes how cities manage safety and security, Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking “Carpet CCTV” project.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: From surveillance to safety: How Kazakhstan’s Carpet CCTV is reshaping security
item.description: In a world where technology increasingly shapes how cities manage safety and security, Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking “Carpet CCTV” project.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 4 key concepts for Rust beginners
item.description: Few languages are as highly esteemed by developers as Rust, which promises robust memory safety without compromising speed. Rust also has a steep learning curve, though, and some of its programming concepts can feel like a barrier to knowing it well.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: Elon Musk’s attachment to President-elect Donald Trump has created an unprecedented alliance between America’s most powerful politician and its richest businessman.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Beaumont, Sarah Parvini And Amelia Thomson-Deveaux, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kotlin Multiplatform Library Search Made Easier with klibs.io
item.description: JetBrains introduces klibs.io, a web service making it easier to find libraries for Kotlin Multiplatform.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 6 ways AI can help UX designers work better—and faster
item.description: Artificial intelligence isn’t creative in the same way that people are. It doesn’t understand inspiration. But that doesn’t mean real UX designers can’t use it. AI can help a designer be more efficient and creative, and do a few more things that might be surprising.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: Europe takes on Starlink with $11.5 billion IRIS² satellite constellation
item.description: The European Union is planning its own satellite constellation, IRIS², as part of a €10.6 billion ($11.1 billion ) initiative to provide secure, resilient connectivity to businesses, governments, and citizens.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Blood in the iPhones? Apple faces criminal charges
item.description: Apple has been accused of knowingly financing a trade characterized by atrocities in criminal litigation launched by the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). It relates to use of so-called “blood minerals” in its devices.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Python AI library hack that didn’t hack Python
item.description: Guess what’s both one of the fastest-growing and most popular languages of 2024? (Hint: It’s not Java.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 12 easy, techy ways to make the holiday smoother
item.description: To make the busiest time of year more manageable, here are some tricks for tracking your packages, taking quality family photos and curating the perfect Christmas playlist.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
